sentences: The Harborview Museum of Natural History will close its doors to the public from Monday, August 5, through Friday, August 30, to undergo a comprehensive renovation of its main exhibition halls.
The project, funded in part by a $2 million grant from the City Arts Council, will modernize display systems and improve accessibility throughout the building.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this announcement?
choices: (A) To inform the public of a museum's temporary closure
(B) To promote upcoming educational programs
(C) To announce the opening of a new exhibition
(D) To request donations for museum renovations
choices_kr: (A) 박물관의 임시 폐관을 대중에게 알리기 위해
(C) 박물관 리모델링을 위한 기부를 요청하기 위해
steps.kr: Harborview 자연사박물관은 주요 전시실의 종합적인 리모델링을 위해 8월 5일부터 8월 30일까지 폐관한다. City Arts Council의 200만 달러 보조금으로 일부 지원되는 이 프로젝트는 전시 시스템을 현대화하고 건물 전체의 접근성을 개선할 것이다.

sentences: Visitors who hold valid annual memberships will receive a one-month extension on their current membership period as compensation for the closure.
Season ticket holders are advised to contact the membership office at membership@harborviewmuseum.org to confirm their updated expiration dates.
steps.question: What will annual members receive during the closure period?
steps.question_kr: 연간 회원들은 폐관 기간 동안 무엇을 받는가?
choices: (A) Priority tickets for the reopening event
(B) A one-month extension to their membership
(C) A full refund of their membership fee
(D) Free access to partner museums
steps.kr: 유효한 연간 회원권 보유자는 폐관 보상으로 회원 기간이 1개월 연장된다. 시즌권 소지자는 업데이트된 만료일 확인을 위해 membership@harborviewmuseum.org로 연락하도록 권고된다.

sentences: The museum's gift shop and café will remain accessible to the public throughout the renovation period via a temporary entrance on Maple Avenue.
Upon reopening on September 2, the museum will debut its newly redesigned permanent collection, featuring an expanded prehistoric life wing and a state-of-the-art planetarium.
steps.question: What can be inferred about the museum after the renovation?
steps.question_kr: 리모델링 후 박물관에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It will offer new exhibits that were not there before
(B) It will close permanently after the renovation
(C) It will reduce the size of its gift shop
(D) It will charge higher admission fees
choices_kr: (A) 이전에 없던 새로운 전시를 제공할 것이다
steps.kr: 박물관 기념품점과 카페는 Maple Avenue 임시 입구를 통해 계속 이용 가능하다. 9월 2일 재개관 시 확장된 선사시대 생명 전시관과 최첨단 플라네타리움을 갖춘 새로운 상설 컬렉션을 선보일 것이다.

sentences: Meridian Technologies announced yesterday that it has completed its acquisition of CloudBridge Solutions, a leading provider of enterprise data management software, for an estimated $380 million.
The deal, which was first reported in January, is expected to significantly expand Meridian's presence in the rapidly growing cloud computing market.
steps.question: What is this article mainly about?
steps.question_kr: 이 기사는 주로 무엇에 관한 것인가?
choices: (A) The financial difficulties of CloudBridge Solutions
(B) Changes in cloud computing regulations
(C) The launch of a new cloud computing product
(D) The completion of a corporate acquisition
steps.kr: Meridian Technologies는 기업 데이터 관리 소프트웨어 공급업체인 CloudBridge Solutions를 약 3억 8천만 달러에 인수 완료했다고 발표했다. 이 거래는 클라우드 컴퓨팅 시장에서 Meridian의 입지를 크게 확장할 것으로 예상된다.

sentences: CloudBridge's existing team of 420 employees will be integrated into Meridian's operations division, with no planned redundancies according to the company's official statement.
The combined entity will serve over 3,000 corporate clients across 28 countries.
steps.question: According to the article, what will happen to CloudBridge employees?
steps.question_kr: 기사에 따르면, CloudBridge 직원들은 어떻게 되는가?
choices: (A) They will join Meridian's operations division
(B) They will be relocated to Meridian's headquarters
(C) They will be offered voluntary retirement packages
(D) They will work independently under a new brand
choices_kr: (B) 새 브랜드 아래 독립적으로 일할 것이다
steps.kr: CloudBridge의 기존 420명 직원팀은 감원 계획 없이 Meridian의 운영 부서에 통합될 것이다. 합병된 회사는 28개국에 걸쳐 3,000개 이상의 기업 고객에게 서비스를 제공할 것이다.

sentences: Industry analysts have responded positively to the merger, noting that CloudBridge's proprietary data encryption technology fills a critical gap in Meridian's current product lineup.
Meridian's stock rose 4.2 percent in early trading following the announcement, reflecting investor optimism about the deal's long-term strategic value.
steps.question: What is implied about the acquisition?
steps.question_kr: 인수에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is expected to strengthen Meridian's product offerings
(B) It was motivated primarily by reducing competition
(C) It was opposed by most industry analysts
(D) It will result in significant job losses at Meridian
choices_kr: (A) Meridian의 제품 라인업을 강화할 것으로 예상된다
(D) Meridian에서 상당한 일자리 감소를 초래할 것이다
steps.kr: 업계 분석가들은 CloudBridge의 독자적인 데이터 암호화 기술이 Meridian의 현재 제품 라인의 중요한 공백을 채운다고 언급하며 합병에 긍정적으로 반응했다.

sentences: We are pleased to announce that Vanguard Legal Associates will be relocating its offices to the newly constructed Pinnacle Tower at 88 Commerce Drive, effective November 1.
This move reflects our firm's continued growth and our commitment to providing clients and staff with a modern, state-of-the-art working environment.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this notice?
choices: (A) To notify staff of changes to working hours
(B) To promote the firm's new legal services
(C) To announce the firm's merger with another company
(D) To inform clients and staff of an office relocation
steps.kr: Vanguard Legal Associates가 11월 1일부로 88 Commerce Drive에 새로 건설된 Pinnacle Tower로 사무소를 이전한다고 기쁘게 알려드립니다. 이번 이전은 회사의 지속적인 성장과 고객 및 직원들에게 현대적인 근무 환경을 제공하려는 의지를 반영합니다.

sentences: All telephone numbers and email addresses will remain unchanged, and client files will be transferred securely prior to the move.

Clients with scheduled appointments during the transition week of October 28-31 are advised to confirm their appointment details with their assigned attorney, as some meetings may need to be rescheduled.
steps.question: What are clients with appointments during October 28-31 advised to do?
choices: (A) Visit the new office at Pinnacle Tower
(B) Cancel their appointments and rebook after November 1
(C) Confirm their appointment details with their attorney
(D) Contact the main reception to update their records
choices_kr: (B) 메인 안내 데스크에 연락하여 기록 업데이트
(C) 담당 변호사에게 예약 세부 사항 확인
steps.kr: 모든 전화번호와 이메일 주소는 변경되지 않으며, 고객 파일은 이전 전에 안전하게 이전된다. 10월 28-31일 이전 주에 예약이 있는 고객들은 담당 변호사에게 예약 세부 사항을 확인하도록 권고된다.

sentences: The new location offers significantly expanded office space, a dedicated client consultation suite, and underground parking for up to 80 vehicles.
We look forward to welcoming you to our new home and continuing to deliver the exceptional legal services you have come to expect from Vanguard.
steps.question: What is implied about Vanguard Legal Associates' current office?
steps.question_kr: Vanguard Legal Associates의 현재 사무소에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is located in a modern building
(B) It recently underwent major renovations
(C) It is shared with another law firm
(D) It has fewer amenities than the new location
steps.kr: 새 위치는 크게 확장된 사무 공간, 전용 고객 상담실, 최대 80대를 위한 지하 주차장을 제공한다. 새 사무소에서 여러분을 환영하고 탁월한 법률 서비스를 계속 제공하기를 기대합니다.

sentences: Hometech Appliances has issued a voluntary recall of approximately 15,000 units of its HT-700 Series electric pressure cookers sold between January and September of this year.
The company identified a potential defect in the lid-locking mechanism that could, under certain conditions, cause the lid to open unexpectedly during operation, posing a burn risk to users.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (A) To announce a new product launch by Hometech
(B) To warn consumers about a defective product recall
(C) To promote safer alternatives to pressure cookers
(D) To report a lawsuit filed against Hometech Appliances
choices_kr: (B) 결함 제품 리콜에 대한 소비자 경고
(C) Hometech Appliances를 상대로 제기된 소송 보도
steps.kr: Hometech Appliances는 올해 1월부터 9월 사이에 판매된 약 15,000개의 HT-700 Series 전기 압력솥에 대한 자발적 리콜을 발표했다. 뚜껑 잠금 장치의 잠재적 결함이 작동 중 화상 위험을 초래할 수 있다는 것을 확인했다.

sentences: Customers who own an affected unit are asked to immediately discontinue use and contact Hometech's customer support line at 1-800-HOMETECH to arrange a free replacement.
Proof of purchase is not required to qualify for the replacement program.
steps.question: What must customers do if they own an affected product?
steps.question_kr: 해당 제품을 소유한 고객들은 무엇을 해야 하는가?
choices: (A) Stop using it and call Hometech's support line
(B) Wait for a Hometech representative to contact them
(C) Submit a written complaint to the consumer protection agency
(D) Return the product to the store where it was purchased
choices_kr: (A) 사용을 중단하고 Hometech 지원 라인에 전화
(B) 소비자 보호 기관에 서면 민원 제출
steps.kr: 해당 제품을 소유한 고객은 즉시 사용을 중단하고 1-800-HOMETECH로 연락하여 무료 교체를 마련하도록 요청된다. 교체 프로그램 자격을 얻기 위해 구매 증명이 필요하지 않다.

sentences: The recall affects models with serial numbers beginning with HT7 followed by a letter between A and G.
Models purchased after October 1 are not affected, as the manufacturing defect was corrected at that time.
Hometech has reported no injuries related to the defect so far, but emphasizes that the recall is being conducted as a precautionary measure.
steps.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned in the article?
choices: (A) The countries where the recall applies
(B) When the defect was fixed in manufacturing
(C) The number of injuries reported so far
(D) The serial numbers of affected models
steps.kr: 리콜은 HT7로 시작하는 일련번호 모델에 영향을 미친다. 10월 1일 이후 구매한 모델은 영향을 받지 않는다. Hometech는 지금까지 결함과 관련된 부상을 보고하지 않았지만 예방 조치로 시행되고 있다고 강조한다.

sentences: The city's Metropolitan Transit Authority (MTA) has announced a $150 million infrastructure upgrade to the Central Line subway system, scheduled to begin in the spring.
The project aims to replace aging signal equipment, install platform screen doors at 12 stations, and introduce a new contactless fare payment system across the entire network.
steps.question: What is this article primarily about?
steps.question_kr: 이 기사는 주로 무엇에 관한 것인가?
choices: (A) The MTA's annual financial report
(B) The introduction of a new bus rapid transit line
(C) A major upgrade to the city's subway system
(D) Environmental concerns about subway construction
steps.kr: MTA는 봄에 시작될 예정인 Central Line 지하철 시스템에 대한 1억 5천만 달러 규모의 인프라 업그레이드를 발표했다. 노후화된 신호 장비 교체, 스크린도어 설치, 비접촉식 요금 결제 시스템 도입을 목표로 한다.

sentences: Construction will be carried out primarily during overnight hours to minimize disruption to daily commuters.
However, passengers should expect weekend service suspensions on the Central Line between Harbor Station and Riverside Junction from April through August.
steps.question: According to the article, when will service suspensions occur?
steps.question_kr: 기사에 따르면, 서비스 중단은 언제 발생하는가?
choices: (A) On weekends from April through August
(B) Every night throughout the construction period
(C) On weekday mornings from April through August
(D) Only during the final week of construction
steps.kr: 공사는 주로 야간에 진행된다. 그러나 승객들은 4월부터 8월까지 Harbor Station과 Riverside Junction 사이에서 주말 서비스 중단을 예상해야 한다.

sentences: MTA Chairman Patricia Nguyen stated that the upgrades represent the most significant investment in the city's transit infrastructure in over three decades.
The new contactless payment system, compatible with most smartphones and bank cards, is expected to reduce boarding times by up to 30 percent, potentially easing congestion at peak hours.
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (A) Smartphone payments are not currently accepted on the network
(B) The subway system was upgraded three decades ago
(C) The current payment system slows down boarding
(D) The MTA plans to expand the Central Line to new areas
choices_kr: (A) MTA는 Central Line을 새 지역으로 확장할 계획이다
(C) 현재 결제 시스템은 승차 속도를 늦춘다
(D) 현재 네트워크에서 스마트폰 결제가 허용되지 않는다
steps.kr: MTA 의장은 이번 업그레이드가 30년 이상 만에 가장 중요한 투자라고 말했다. 새로운 비접촉식 결제 시스템은 승차 시간을 최대 30% 단축하여 피크 시간대의 혼잡을 완화할 것으로 예상된다.

sentences: Greenfield Solar has officially broken ground on what will become the largest solar energy farm in the eastern region, spanning over 500 acres of previously unused farmland in Lancaster County.
The $180 million project, scheduled for completion by late next year, is expected to generate enough electricity to power approximately 40,000 households.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (A) To advertise solar panels for residential use
(B) To report on the construction of a major solar energy facility
(C) To compare solar and wind energy production
(D) To announce a government subsidy for farmers
choices_kr: (B) 대규모 태양 에너지 시설 건설을 보도하기 위해
(C) 태양 에너지와 풍력 에너지를 비교하기 위해
steps.kr: Greenfield Solar는 Lancaster County의 미사용 농지 500에이커 이상에 동부 지역 최대 태양광 발전소 착공에 들어갔다. 1억 8천만 달러 규모로 내년 말 완공 예정이며 약 4만 가구에 전력을 공급할 것으로 예상된다.

sentences: According to spokesperson Diana Wells, the farm will utilize next-generation photovoltaic panels capable of operating at 25 percent greater efficiency than conventional models.
Local officials have welcomed the development, noting it will create over 300 construction jobs and 50 permanent positions once operational.
steps.question: What advantage do the solar panels offer?
choices: (A) They operate with higher efficiency than standard panels
(B) They require no maintenance
(C) They are manufactured locally
(D) They can store excess energy indefinitely
steps.kr: 대변인 Diana Wells에 따르면 차세대 태양광 패널은 기존 모델보다 25% 높은 효율로 작동한다. 지역 관리들은 300개 이상의 건설 일자리와 50개의 정규직을 창출할 것이라며 환영했다.

sentences: Environmental groups have praised the initiative, pointing out that the facility will offset an estimated 200,000 tons of carbon emissions annually.
Greenfield Solar plans to explore additional sites and has already submitted preliminary proposals for two more projects in neighboring counties.
steps.question: What can be inferred about Greenfield Solar?
steps.question_kr: Greenfield Solar에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It will relocate its headquarters
(B) It has faced opposition from environmental groups
(C) It plans to expand beyond a single project
(D) It has received approval for all future projects
steps.kr: 환경 단체들은 시설이 연간 약 20만 톤의 탄소 배출을 상쇄할 것이라며 칭찬했다. Greenfield Solar는 추가 부지를 탐색 중이며 인근 두 군에 예비 제안서를 제출했다.

sentences: Westgate Medical Center has announced outpatient clinic on Elm Street to reduce wait times and expand primary care access for downtown residents.
The facility opens March 15 with 20 examination rooms, a diagnostic imaging suite, and an on-site pharmacy
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (A) 새 의료 시설 개소를 알리기 위해
(B) To criticize recent industry practices
(C) To advertise a product to consumers
(D) To report personnel changes at the organization
choices_kr: (A) 새 의료 시설 개소를 알리기 위해
steps.kr: Westgate Medical Center가 outpatient clinic on Elm Street to reduce wait times and expand primary care access for downtown residents를 발표했다. The facility opens March 15 with 20 examination rooms, a diagnostic imaging suite, and an on-site pharmacy

sentences: The clinic will be staffed by 12 physicians in internal medicine, pediatrics, and dermatology, along with 30 nurses
Walk-in appointments are available Monday through Saturday, 8 A.M. to 7 P.M., and visits can also be scheduled through the online portal
steps.question: 환자는 어떻게 예약하는가?
choices: (A) No specific information was provided
(B) It applies only to international operations
(C) It has been postponed indefinitely
(D) 방문 또는 온라인 포털을 통해
steps.kr: The clinic will be staffed by 12 physicians in internal medicine, pediatrics, and dermatology, along with 30 nurses Walk-in appointments are available Monday through Saturday, 8 A.M. to 7 P.M., and visits can also be scheduled through the online portal

sentences: The new location is part of a broader initiative to decentralize services and bring healthcare closer to underserved communities
Additional satellite clinics are planned for the northern and western districts, with construction expected to begin in the fourth quarter
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (A) The initiative has been widely criticized
(B) 다른 지역에 더 많은 클리닉을 열 예정이다
(C) No further developments are expected
(D) The organization plans to reduce operations
choices_kr: (B) 다른 지역에 더 많은 클리닉을 열 예정이다
steps.kr: The new location is part of a broader initiative to decentralize services and bring healthcare closer to underserved communities Additional satellite clinics are planned for the northern and western districts, with construction expected to begin in the fourth quarter

sentences: Kensington International Airport has announced $1.2 billion terminal expansion to accommodate projected 30 percent increase in passenger traffic over the next decade.
New Terminal D will add 24 gates and a dedicated international arrivals hall, with construction beginning in January
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (A) To report personnel changes at the organization
(B) 국제공항 확장 프로젝트를 보도하기 위해
(C) To advertise a product to consumers
(D) To criticize recent industry practices
steps.kr: Kensington International Airport가 $1.2 billion terminal expansion to accommodate projected 30 percent increase in passenger traffic over the next decade를 발표했다. New Terminal D will add 24 gates and a dedicated international arrivals hall, with construction beginning in January

sentences: During construction, passengers using Gates 15 through 22 will be temporarily relocated to a modular facility adjacent to Terminal B via a covered walkway
Airport officials assured no flights will be canceled and additional signage will be installed to guide travelers
steps.question: 영향 받는 승객은 어떻게 수용되는가?
choices: (A) B터미널 근처 임시 시설을 이용한다
(B) No specific information was provided
(C) It has been postponed indefinitely
(D) It applies only to international operations
steps.kr: During construction, passengers using Gates 15 through 22 will be temporarily relocated to a modular facility adjacent to Terminal B via a covered walkway Airport officials assured no flights will be canceled and additional signage will be installed to guide travelers

sentences: The expansion includes a 5,000-space parking garage with electric vehicle charging stations, reflecting growing demand for sustainable travel infrastructure
Retail and dining options in the new terminal are expected to generate $45 million in annual revenue
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (A) No further developments are expected
(B) 환경을 고려한 시설을 포함할 것이다
(C) The initiative has been widely criticized
(D) The organization plans to reduce operations
steps.kr: The expansion includes a 5,000-space parking garage with electric vehicle charging stations, reflecting growing demand for sustainable travel infrastructure Retail and dining options in the new terminal are expected to generate $45 million in annual revenue

sentences: Apex Pharmaceuticals has announced breakthrough treatment for chronic migraines that reduces symptom frequency by up to 70 percent in clinical trials.
The drug, currently in phase three trials involving 3,200 participants across 14 countries, may receive FDA approval by year-end
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this article?
choices: (A) To advertise a product to consumers
(B) To criticize recent industry practices
(C) To report personnel changes at the organization
(D) 신약 임상 시험 결과를 보도하기 위해
choices_kr: (D) 신약 임상 시험 결과를 보도하기 위해
steps.kr: Apex Pharmaceuticals가 breakthrough treatment for chronic migraines that reduces symptom frequency by up to 70 percent in clinical trials를 발표했다. The drug, currently in phase three trials involving 3,200 participants across 14 countries, may receive FDA approval by year-end

sentences: Trial participants reported a 70 percent reduction in migraine episodes, with side effects limited to mild nausea in fewer than 5 percent of subjects
The treatment is administered as a monthly injection and can be self-administered at home after initial medical supervision
steps.question: 임상 시험 참가자 수는 얼마인가?
choices: (A) It applies only to international operations
(B) No specific information was provided

steps.kr: DataVault Corporation은 엔터프라이즈 데이터 암호화 솔루션 선도 기업 CloudSecure를 2억 달러에 인수 완료하여 사이버보안 포트폴리오를 크게 확장했다. 6개월간의 협상 끝에 지난 금요일 확정된 이 인수로 CloudSecure의 직원 850명과 법인 고객 3,400곳이 DataVault 산하로 편입되었다.

sentences: DataVault CEO Sandra Liu stated that CloudSecure's encryption technology will be integrated into the company's existing cloud storage platform within the next six months.
All CloudSecure employees will retain their positions, and the company's research and development center in Austin, Texas, will continue operating as a dedicated encryption innovation lab.
steps.question: What will happen to CloudSecure's employees?
choices: (A) They will all retain their current positions
(B) Half of them will be laid off
(C) They must reapply for their jobs
(D) They will be relocated to a new office
steps.kr: DataVault CEO Sandra Liu는 CloudSecure의 암호화 기술이 6개월 내 기존 클라우드 저장 플랫폼에 통합될 것이라고 밝혔다. 모든 CloudSecure 직원은 직책을 유지하며, 텍사스 오스틴의 R&D 센터는 전용 암호화 혁신 연구소로 계속 운영된다.

sentences: Industry analysts view the acquisition as a defensive move, noting that recent high-profile data breaches have increased corporate demand for advanced encryption by over 40 percent.

DataVault's stock price rose 8 percent following the announcement, suggesting investors are confident the acquisition will strengthen the company's competitive position in the growing cybersecurity market.
steps.question: What can be inferred from the article?
choices: (A) Investors reacted negatively to the acquisition
(B) The cybersecurity market is expected to grow
(C) DataVault plans to exit the cybersecurity sector
(D) CloudSecure was struggling financially before the deal
choices_kr: (D) CloudSecure는 거래 전 재정적 어려움을 겪고 있었다
steps.kr: 업계 분석가들은 최근의 대규모 데이터 유출 사건으로 고급 암호화에 대한 기업 수요가 40% 이상 증가했다며 이를 방어적 조치로 보고 있다. DataVault 주가는 발표 후 8% 상승했으며 투자자들이 이 인수가 성장하는 사이버보안 시장에서 경쟁력을 강화할 것이라고 확신하고 있음을 시사한다.
